name: A New Well-Supported Semantics for Description Logic Programs
summary: arXiv:2607.21203v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Description logic programs are a powerful formalism for combining rules with ontologies. The well-supported semantics for description logic programs...
description: arXiv:2607.21203v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Description logic programs are a powerful formalism for combining rules with ontologies. The well-supported semantics for description logic programs ensures that no answer sets rely on cyclic dependencies. Most popular semantics for logic programming have this property of well-supportedness. We recognize two limitations of the current well-support...
author: Spencer Killen, Jia-Huai You
